mapper.sql: id, enterprise_id, name, category, measurement_unit, equivalent_value, equal_value, low_heat_value, carbon_content, oxidation_rate, color, is_active, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM bs_energy WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bs_energy ( enterprise_id, name, category, measurement_unit, equivalent_value, equal_value, low_heat_value, carbon_content, oxidation_rate, color, is_active, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted ) VALUES ( #{enterpriseId}, #{name}, #{category}, #{measurementUnit}, #{equivalentValue}, #{equalValue}, #{lowHeatValue}, #{carbonContent}, #{oxidationRate}, #{color}, #{isActive}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, NOW(), #{updateBy}, NOW(), 0 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE bs_energy
update_time = NOW(), update_by = #{updateBy}, name = #{name}, category = #{category}, measurement_unit = #{measurementUnit}, equivalent_value = #{equivalentValue}, equal_value = #{equalValue}, low_heat_value = #{lowHeatValue}, carbon_content = #{carbonContent}, oxidation_rate = #{oxidationRate}, color = #{color}, is_active = #{isActive}, remark = #{remark},
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
